                    CyberSabil Tools Website
                    A CMS-controlled IT tools hub for scripts, downloads, command blocks, guides, project cards and FAQ content.
                    GitHub Pages · HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSON, Pages CMS
                    
                
            
                
                    
                    Active
                    Glass Gateway Dual Mode
                    A same-homepage mode system that lets visitors open the existing tools website or switch into a professional portfolio layout.
                    Website architecture · Vanilla JavaScript, CSS, CMS settings, GitHub Pages
                    
                
            
                
                    
                    Active
                    TrafficMonitor Auto Setup
                    A GitHub-hosted PowerShell launcher for installing and configuring TrafficMonitor with a repeatable setup flow.
                    Windows automation · PowerShell, GitHub Pages, Windows Scheduled Tasks
                    
                
            
                
                    
                    Active
                    TrafficMonitor Deep Clean
                    A controlled removal workflow for TrafficMonitor files, startup entries, scheduled tasks and user-profile leftovers.
                    Cleanup workflow · PowerShell, Windows Registry, File System
                    
                
            
                
                    
                    Planned
                    CyberSabil IT Tools EXE
                    A future standalone dashboard for common Windows diagnostics, admin shortcuts, support utilities and safe command access.
                    Desktop utility · C#, Windows Desktop, GitHub Releases
